title: Stone of restore(HP and Full)
description: This is a world make up of "HP" and "Full".
body:
# Stone of restore(HP and Full)
*This is a world make up of HP and Full.*

![LOGO](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https://i.ibb.co/J5MCmVH/logo222.png&n=-1)
![LOGO2](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https://i.ibb.co/5jHJVSw/obsidian222.png&n=-1)

## Features
- Brand new mineral
- Make food focused on health or hunger recovery
- Use excess resources to synthesize more advanced items
- New ways to enhance your enchant table and beacon
- Create tools with special effects
- A very powerful set of equipment

## Achievement list

![Achievement system](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https://i.ibb.co/jV9KCdq/2021-03-22-20-35-14.png&n=-1)

<details>
<summary>Open!</summary>

**Stone of restore**
This is a world make up of HP and Full.\
**Hp powder**
get a hp powder\
**Full powder**
get a full powder\
**It look so "Health"!?**
get a hp ingot\
**It look so yummy**
get a full ingot\
**"HP" power**
eat a hp ingot\
**"Full" power**
eat a full ingot\
**Yummy yummy!**
eat hp ingot and full ingot\
**It so expensive**
Get restore stone\
**Start of restore**
get any restore tool\
**Restore power**
get "restorealltool"\
**OP power**
get OPblock and sit down it\
**True OP power!!**
make all restore armor\
**Healthy food**
carry any hp food\
**Delicious food**
carry any full food\
**Healthy foods!**
carry all hp food\
**Delicious foods!**
carry all full food\
**Healthy and Delicious!!!**
get all HP and Full foods\
**Crazy action**
use restore stone(WoW)\
**???**
???

</details>

## More Info
Known issue: When using equipment or tools that can continuously restore hunger, the hunger will continue to increase even if it is full on the display.\
**This module was made using Mcreator, but due to damage to the workspace, it will no longer be updated and maintained (the reloaded version is in production, coming soon and stay tuned!)**

Feel free to add this mod to your modpack :D
